name: Flickr
description: Specs and technical requirements for Flickr photo uploads, profiles, and groups.

items.name: Photo Upload (Free)
items.notes: Free accounts limited to 1,000 photos; images stored at original resolution

items.name: Photo Upload (Pro)
items.notes: Pro accounts get unlimited uploads and original file storage including RAW-adjacent TIF

items.name: Maximum Pixel Dimensions
items.notes: Flickr stores and serves original dimensions; largest sizes served up to 6144 px on the long edge in-browser

items.name: Video Upload
items.notes: Videos stored at up to 1080p; transcoded for web playback

items.name: Buddy Icon (Profile Photo)
items.notes: Displayed alongside photos, comments, and in groups

items.name: Cover Photo
items.notes: Banner image shown at the top of the photostream; any uploaded photo can be set as cover

items.name: Photo Description
items.notes: Supports a subset of HTML tags including links and basic formatting

items.name: Tags per Photo
items.notes: Each tag up to 255 characters; spaces create separate tags unless quoted

items.name: Video Upload
items.notes: Pro accounts only; transcoded and served at up to 1080p via HLS

items.name: Flickr Ads
items.notes: Flickr uses third-party display advertising on free accounts; standard IAB formats (300×250, 728×90) served via partner ad networks
